sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115900" key="yuxodai+kth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῡχο-δᾰϊκτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115900.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">destroying</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">killing the soul,</tr_> epith. of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
